settings.block_des: A trusted equipment manufacturer in the beauty world for over 30 years! See more in our equipment collection.

settings.block_content: A superior Beeswax blend, carefully sourced with ethical standards.
Adheres more to the hair and not the skin, leaving the skin feeling soft & supple and clients feeling confident & fresh.
Doing business together, we help animals, people, plants and our planet to thrive.

settings.block_title_question: What is the best way to disinfect the treatment wands?
settings.block_description_question: The electrode can be disinfected either by placing it in UV sterilization for at least 21 minutes or by soaking it in an anti-bacterial solution.

settings.block_title_question: I feel a minor shock when I touch a wand to the skin.  How do I prevent the shock?
settings.block_description_question: Place your finger on the head of the electrode to make contact before applying it to the customer’s skin.

settings.block_title_question: If you own more wands then fit in the machine, what do you recommend the best way to store them?  For instance, is there an insulated carrying case available?
settings.block_description_question: Unfortunately Equipro does not sell a separate storage case. They can simply be stored in a small basket inside a drawer.

settings.block_title_question: When in the middle of a treatment and I need to apply more product to a client's face, since the handle with the wand does not fit in the holder on the machine, where do you suggest I place the handle?
settings.block_description_question: On a straight, stable surface to prevent the handle from falling and breaking the electrode.
